mechanics.breadcrumb_path: Rules Compendium > Page 084 > items > This trait can be taken multiple times for
mechanics.excerpt: This trait can be taken multiple times for multiple lost limbs_ The specific effects vary depending the limb lost; though due to the nature of this trait the gamemaster will often have t0 be the final arbiter on how restricts character based on the specific circumstances These effects assume the char- acter has no prosthetic replacement for the lost limb: for infor- mation on prosthetic replacement limbs see 144 of the Equipment section lost finger (or two or three results in reduction in manua dexterity.
